title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
